raw_consumer_statement:
We rented a car in XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX from XXXX till XXXX, using our Citi Platinum MasterCard to pay. We paid the merchant, XXXX {$490.00} for a fully insured vehicle with XXXX out of pocket responsibility even if the car was totaled as shown in the contract. We returned the car in time and got the clearance to go. A few days later, the merchant unlawfully charged my card {$2000.00}. We immediately stopped the card and filed a claim with Citi XXXX XXXX, providing all documents and receipts. 
XXXX months later, the dispute center informed us that the merchant provided some documents, basically receipts for fixing a scratch on XXXX door. As such, the center decided in favor of the merchant, clearly missing the fact that the car was fully insured. 
We tried numerously to contact the Dispute Center to explain what they missed, but no one was willing to talk to us, nor to justify their decision. Citibank, our bank for more than XXXX XXXX failed to protect our money from an overseas scammer for the amount of {$2000.00}.
